title: Lua Editor arrives in Vortex Web
summary: This patch improves the Lua Editor API shape, adds Roblox-style scripting aliases, documents the current Lua surface, and keeps the 0.8 runtime cleanup moving.
changelog: Expanded Lua with Roblox-style aliases such as game:GetService, Players, Workspace, RunService, UserInputService, Instance.new, Vector3, Color3, and UDim2.
Kept the existing Vortex Web API for HUD layers, surface drawing, chat hooks, camera tools, raycasts, player overrides, world markers, and local runtime parts.
Added built-in Lua examples for the interface playground and smooth camera collision.
Added Lua API documentation in the repo README.
Fixed packaged Lua script exposure for extension builds.
Please report Lua, UGC, UI, and performance issues on GitHub.
